LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.promptFieldInstructio: Treat these as the pawn's event-time beliefs about this event. Do not invent doctrine or imply that belief caused the event.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.0.phra: Speak with firm conviction while staying faithful to the supplied facts.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.1.phra: Speak with assurance without inventing zeal or extremism.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.2.phra: Allow tension and exceptions without claiming the faith was abandoned.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.3.phra: Show an active struggle between doctrine and lived experience.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.4.phra: Allow questioning and uncertainty without forcing sadness or conversion.
